emptyState.title: What do you want to do?
emptyState.body: Pick a starting point or just type below.

starters.title: Work on a CSV
starters.description: Clean up or generate spreadsheet data.
starters.prompt: Help me create or edit CSV files on this computer.

starters.title: Connect ChatGPT
starters.description: Add your OpenAi provider so ChatGPT models are ready in new sessions.

starters.title: Automate Chrome
starters.description: Start a browser automation conversation right away.
starters.prompt: Help me connect to Chrome and automate a repetitive task.

messages.text:
Hi welcome to OpenWork!

People use us to write .csv files on their computer, connect to Chrome and automate repetitive tasks, and sync contacts to Notion.

But the only limit is your imagination.

What would you want to do?
I can help you generate, clean, merge, and summarize CSV files. What kind of CSV work do you want to automate?
I want to combine exports from multiple tools into one clean CSV.
